title: Haplodictyum exiguum

The classification of this plant is further broken down into the following ranks: kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Pteridophyta), class (Polypodiopsida), order (Dipteridales), family (Dipteridaceae), genus (Haplodictyum), and species (H. exiguum).
